source_description: Fix framework issue #1390: AppParameterBindingBuilder rejects unannotated `array $params` / `array $query` controller parameters with no compatibility shim, breaking every consumer using the legacy implicit-array signature (184 methods across 37 files in Minoo alone). Restore implicit-array binding via deprecation-emitting shim — unannotated `array $params` defaults to #[MapRoute], unannotated `array $query` defaults to #[MapQuery] — keep the strict invariant for any other unannotated array parameter, and add regression tests so the shim cannot silently regress. Mirrors the alpha.165 `tenancy:` migration ergonomics. Unblocks Minoo's re-frozen alpha.171→172 upgrade mission and clears the gate on the post-1390-dispatcher-reconciliation mission's WP02–WP04.
